'''pamuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebine|cebine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebine|cebine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pamuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæmiyith|pæmiyith]] || [[word:pæmiyij|pæmiyij]] || [[word:pæmiyish|pæmiyish]] || [[word:pæmiyi|pæmiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pamumuyuth|pamumuyuth]] || [[word:pamumuyuj|pamumuyuj]] || [[word:pamumuyush|pamumuyush]] || [[word:pamumuyu|pamumuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pamuyuth|pamuyuth]] || [[word:pamuyuj|pamuyuj]] || [[word:pamuyush|pamuyush]] || [[word:pamuyu|pamuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pamufyuth|pamufyuth]] || [[word:pamufyuj|pamufyuj]] || [[word:pamufyush|pamufyush]] || [[word:pamufyuf|pamufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pamuyuthu|pamuyuthu]] || [[word:pamuyuju|pamuyuju]] || [[word:pamuyushu|pamuyushu]] || [[word:pamuyuku|pamuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pamuyuth|pamuyuth]] || [[word:pamuyuj|pamuyuj]] || [[word:pamuyush|pamuyush]] || [[word:pamuyu|pamuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pamuyuthul|pamuyuthul]] || [[word:pamuyujul|pamuyujul]] || [[word:pamuyushul|pamuyushul]] || [[word:pamuyukul|pamuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pamuyuthuthu|pamuyuthuthu]] || [[word:pamuyujuju|pamuyujuju]] || [[word:pamuyushushu|pamuyushushu]] || [[word:pamuyuku|pamuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pamuyuthun|pamuyuthun]] || [[word:pamuyujun|pamuyujun]] || [[word:pamuyushun|pamuyushun]] || [[word:pamuyukun|pamuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pamuyuthuoro|pamuyuthuoro]] || [[word:pamuyujuoro|pamuyujuoro]] || [[word:pamuyushuoro|pamuyushuoro]] || [[word:pamuyukuoro|pamuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
